content:
- [Always push to live after changes](feedback_push_to_live.md) — Na elke wijziging pushen naar https://github.com/danieldk04/zenbtw (main branch, app/index.html)
- [ZENbtw project context](project_zenbtw.md) — Twee codebases: live HTML-app op GitHub + lokale Next.js versie; fiscale logica BTW bruto-extractie en KOR-splitsing

name: Always push to live after changes
description: User wants every code change pushed to the live GitHub repo immediately after making it
type: feedback
---

After every code change, push to the live site via git.

**Why:** User explicitly requested "push gelijk naar de live site altijd vanaf nu."

**How to apply:**
- Live site is at https://github.com/danieldk04/zenbtw (GitHub Pages)
- The live HTML app lives in `app/index.html` on the `main` branch of that repo
- After editing `app/index.ht

name: ZENbtw project context
description: Context over het ZENbtw dashboard project, architectuur en de twee codebases
type: project
---

ZENbtw (voorheen Kortax) is een BTW-dashboard voor marketplace-verkopers (Vinted, Etsy, Shopify).

**Live site:** https://github.com/danieldk04/zenbtw — GitHub Pages, statische HTML-app in `app/index.html`

**Lokale Next.js versie:** `/Users/Danie/Sites/kortax-dashboard` — DDD-architectuur met React/Next.js, aparte `main` branch, NIET verbonden met de live sit

name: shopify_auto_push
description: Automatically push Shopify theme changes to live after each edit
metadata: 
  node_type: memory
  type: feedback
  originSessionId: 5edadddf-fef2-49dc-941d-6d96ca88925e
---

**Rule:** After every edit to files in the Shopify theme directory (`/Users/Danie/Documents/Claude AXONGEARShopify Editor`), automatically run the push command to push changes live immediately.

**Why:** User wants all changes to go live instantly without manual intervention.

**How to apply:**
- After using Edit tool on any `.liquid`, `.css`, `.js` files in the theme
- Store details: store = `axongear-2.myshopify.com`, theme_id = `199013728598`
- Command: `cd "/Users/Danie/Documents/Claude AXON

**Rule:** ALTIJD eerst het bestand lezen met Read tool voordat je iets aanpast. Gebruik ALTIJD de Edit tool (gerichte aanpassing) en NOOIT de Write tool op bestaande `.liquid` bestanden — Write overschrijft het hele bestand inclusief alle video-URLs en content die de gebruiker zelf heeft ingevuld via de Shopify admin.

**Why:** De gebruiker voegt zelf video-URLs en content toe via de Shopify admin. Als ik een bestand volledig herschrijf met Write, verdwijnen alle ingevulde URLs en data. Dat is o

- [NEXUS Market Terminal Project](project_nexus.md) — Two-tier self-learning stock scanner; Tier 1 done, Tier 2 + self-eval + HTML still to build

- [Always Push](feedback_always_push.md) — push git commits automatically, no confirmation needed; repo has active automation that may cause push conflicts

name: NEXUS Market Terminal Project
description: Self-learning investor bot (niet trader) — multi-tier aandelenanalyse met deep fundamentals
type: project
originSessionId: 0dc95705-e3f7-4708-a400-be059523f345
---
Building a two-tier investor analysis system called "NEXUS MARKET TERMINAL" (v3 investor mode).

**Architecture:**
- Tier 1 (`tier1_scanner.py`): scant 400 tickers, filtert op ROE >12%, voegt ROIC, P/FCF, 5-jaars CAGR, analistentarget toe. Top 20 naar data.json.
- Tier 2 (`tier2_analyse

name: User Profile
description: User building a self-learning stock market trading bot with Python + Claude AI
type: user
---

Dutch-speaking user (communicates in Dutch). Building a sophisticated automated trading analysis system. Has an HTML concept/mockup for a dashboard called "NEXUS MARKET TERMINAL". Interested in:
- Python automation (yfinance, GitHub Actions)
- AI-driven market analysis (Claude as the reasoning engine)
- Self-improving systems (memory + feedback loops)
- Free/low-cost inf

- [Blog factual accuracy — KOR rules](feedback_blog_factual_accuracy.md) — Never use "terugwerkende kracht" or "3 jaar uitsluiting" for KOR; cite belastingdienst.nl; prompt updated in generate-blog.js
- [Anthropic SDK node-fetch bug](project_anthropic_sdk_node_fetch.md) — ERR_STREAM_PREMATURE_CLOSE in Actions = oude SDK met node-fetch op Node 24; opgelost door SDK upgrade naar 0.106

name: feedback-blog-factual-accuracy

metadata: 
  node_type: memory
  type: feedback
  originSessionId: 1be8841b-3fa7-42dd-855b-71e238ec3bfe
---

Never write incorrect KOR rules in blogs or app copy. The user caught serious factual errors that were being spread across multiple blog posts.

**Correct KOR rules (as of 2026):**
- Overschrijding heeft GEEN terugwerkende kracht. Omzet vóór de gren

name: project_anthropic_sdk_node_fetch
description: ERR_STREAM_PREMATURE_CLOSE in GitHub Actions = oude Anthropic SDK met node-fetch op Node 24
metadata: 
  node_type: memory
  type: project
  originSessionId: 675a06c1-e549-4982-9451-166d1f1c77dd
---

GitHub Actions workflows (auto-blog, post-to-social) faalden met `ERR_STREAM_PREMATURE_CLOSE` / "Premature close" bij Anthropic API streaming calls.

**Oorzaak:** `@anthropic-ai/sdk@0.39.0` bundelt `node-fetch@^2.6.7`, dat lange streaming-responses

name: project_blog_slug_growth_agent
description: Blog werd /blog/undefined omdat growth-agent keywords zonder slug toevoegt; slugify-fallback in generate-blog.js
metadata: 
  node_type: memory
  type: project
  originSessionId: 675a06c1-e549-4982-9451-166d1f1c77dd
---

De `growth-agent` voegt keywords toe aan `keywords.json` (queue) **zonder `slug`-veld**. `generate-blog.js` gebruikte `item.slug` direct → blog werd opgeslagen als `blog/undefined.html` en URL werd `/blog/undefined`.

**Fix (2026
